items.title: Instagram boss reveals he’s paid $900k per year plus stock worth ‘tens of millions of dollars’ as he denies ‘addiction’ claims
items.description: The plaintiff’s lawyer in a landmark social media addiction trial tried to connect Adam Mosseri’s compensation with Instagram’s policy toward filters.

items.title: One of Wall Street’s most feared hedge fund managers on the decline of the dollar: gold is ‘becoming the reserve asset’
items.description: Greenlight Capital's David Einhorn, known for his “Einhorn Effect” and years of touting gold, says the world's central banks don't love dollars anymor...

items.title: OpenClaw is the bad boy of AI agents. Here’s why security experts say you should beware
items.description: The open-source AI agent pushes autonomy to the edge — thrilling hobbyists and unnerving security experts

items.title: The tech billionaires aren’t just grabbing trophy Florida mansions—they have competing half-billion-dollar megayachts jostling for dock space
items.description: $500,000 annual docking fees and private marinas are all part of the package for Florida’s wealthy seagoers.

items.title: The affordability crisis is driving unprecedented price cuts in the housing market, Realtor.com says
items.description: “Builders are clearly responding to today’s affordability pressures,” said Realtor.com chief economist Danielle Hale.
